requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (RS / IEC 62471)

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires for Rwanda is assessed under the Rwanda Standard adopting IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), within the RSB PVoC programme where the lighting standard set requires it. IEC 62471 classifies sources into Risk Groups (RG0 exempt, RG1, RG2, RG3) primarily for blue-light hazard and retinal thermal hazard, and informs whether warning marking is needed for higher risk groups. Assessment is part of the product safety evidence package supporting the Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 面向卢旺达的 LED 灯及灯具光生物安全依据采用 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）的卢旺达标准评定，在照明标准集要求时纳入 RSB PVoC 计划。IEC 62471 将光源划分为风险组（RG0 豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3），主要针对蓝光危害与视网膜热危害，并据此判断较高风险组是否需要警告标识。该评定属于支持符合性证书的产品安全证据包的一部分。
summary.zht: 面向盧旺達的 LED 燈及燈具光生物安全依據採用 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）的盧旺達標準評定，在照明標準集要求時納入 RSB PVoC 計劃。IEC 62471 將光源劃分為風險組（RG0 豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3），主要針對藍光危害與視網膜熱危害，並據此判斷較高風險組是否需要警告標識。該評定屬於支持符合性證書的產品安全證據包的一部分。

standards_or_laws: RS / IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (adopted Rwanda Standard)
RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which transposes IEC 62471, with related guidance in GB/T 34034 for risk-group application. Photobiological safety / blue-light hazard classification is increasingly referenced in Chinese lighting evaluation. The Chinese GB/T 20145 report is domestic evidence; under the RSB PVoC route, an IEC 62471-based report (often from an ILAC-accredited lab) is normally what the inspection body relies on.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），转化自 IEC 62471，并以 GB/T 34034 提供风险组应用相关指导。光生物安全／蓝光危害分级在中国照明评价中日益被引用。中国 GB/T 20145 报告属境内证据；在 RSB PVoC 路径下，检验机构通常采用基于 IEC 62471 的报告（多来自 ILAC 认可实验室）。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），轉化自 IEC 62471，並以 GB/T 34034 提供風險組應用相關指導。光生物安全／藍光危害分級在中國照明評價中日益被引用。中國 GB/T 20145 報告屬境內證據；在 RSB PVoC 路徑下，檢驗機構通常採用基於 IEC 62471 的報告（多來自 ILAC 認可實驗室）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (transposes IEC 62471)
GB/T 34034 — Application guidance for blue-light hazard risk-group classification of lighting products

gap.en: GB/T 20145 and RS / IEC 62471 share the IEC 62471 base, so the photobiological classification method is aligned. The gap is route and report acceptance: Rwanda relies on the RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity and does not automatically accept Chinese CCC / GB/T 20145 evidence; an IEC 62471-based report from an accredited lab is normally required where the lighting standard set calls for photobiological assessment. Where the product falls into RG2 or above, confirm any warning-marking expectations with the PVoC inspection body, since exact marking rules can differ from China.
gap.zh: GB/T 20145 与 RS／IEC 62471 同以 IEC 62471 为基础，故光生物分级方法一致。差距在于路径与报告接受：卢旺达依赖 RSB PVoC 符合性证书，且不自动接受中国 CCC／GB/T 20145 证据；在照明标准集要求进行光生物评定时，通常须提供来自认可实验室的基于 IEC 62471 的报告。若产品属于 RG2 或以上，须向 PVoC 检验机构确认任何警告标识要求，因为具体标识规则可能与中国不同。
gap.zht: GB/T 20145 與 RS／IEC 62471 同以 IEC 62471 為基礎，故光生物分級方法一致。差距在於路徑與報告接受：盧旺達依賴 RSB PVoC 符合性證書，且不自動接受中國 CCC／GB/T 20145 證據；在照明標準集要求進行光生物評定時，通常須提供來自認可實驗室的基於 IEC 62471 的報告。若產品屬於 RG2 或以上，須向 PVoC 檢驗機構確認任何警告標識要求，因為具體標識規則可能與中國不同。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — photobiological safety to RS / IEC 62471 assessed where the applicable lighting standard set requires it, as part of the RSB PVoC Certificate of Conformity evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended GB/T 20145-2006; blue-light hazard classification referenced in evaluation, not a standalone CCC trigger

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological safety for LED lighting into Rwanda is assessed against RS / IEC 62471 where the lighting standard set requires it, as part of the RSB PVoC evidence. GB/T 20145 and IEC 62471 are aligned in method, but Chinese evidence is not automatically accepted; an IEC 62471 report from an accredited lab is typically required. For RG2+ sources, confirm warning-marking expectations with the PVoC body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卢旺达的 LED 照明在照明标准集要求时依据 RS／IEC 62471 评定光生物安全，作为 RSB PVoC 证据的一部分。GB/T 20145 与 IEC 62471 方法一致，但中国证据不会被自动接受；通常须提供来自认可实验室的 IEC 62471 报告。对于 RG2 及以上光源，须向 PVoC 机构确认警告标识要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入盧旺達的 LED 照明在照明標準集要求時依據 RS／IEC 62471 評定光生物安全，作為 RSB PVoC 證據的一部分。GB/T 20145 與 IEC 62471 方法一致，但中國證據不會被自動接受；通常須提供來自認可實驗室的 IEC 62471 報告。對於 RG2 及以上光源，須向 PVoC 機構確認警告標識要求。

requirement_topic.en: Performance / Photometric Declaration (RS / IEC 62612 — self-ballasted LED lamp performance)
requirement_topic.zh: 性能／光度声明（RS／IEC 62612——自镇流 LED 灯性能）
requirement_topic.zht: 性能／光度聲明（RS／IEC 62612——自鎮流 LED 燈性能）

summary.en: Performance characteristics of self-ballasted LED lamps for Rwanda — luminous flux, luminous efficacy, colour rendering index (CRI), correlated colour temperature, lumen maintenance / lifetime and power factor — are declared against the Rwanda Standard adopting IEC 62612 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements). Reliable photometric declaration underpins both the safety evidence and the energy-efficiency labelling claim, and the PVoC body may verify declared figures against the IEC 62612 test report when issuing the Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 面向卢旺达的自镇流 LED 灯性能特性——光通量、光效、显色指数（CRI）、相关色温、光通维持率／寿命及功率因数——依据采用 IEC 62612（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——性能要求）的卢旺达标准声明。可靠的光度声明同时支撑安全证据与能效标签声称，PVoC 机构在签发符合性证书时可对照 IEC 62612 检测报告核验声明数值。
summary.zht: 面向盧旺達的自鎮流 LED 燈性能特性——光通量、光效、顯色指數（CRI）、相關色溫、光通維持率／壽命及功率因數——依據採用 IEC 62612（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——性能要求）的盧旺達標準聲明。可靠的光度聲明同時支撐安全證據與能效標籤聲稱，PVoC 機構在簽發符合性證書時可對照 IEC 62612 檢測報告核驗聲明數值。

standards_or_laws: RS / IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (adopted Rwanda Standard)
RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity required per consignment

summary.en: China's equivalent performance standard is GB/T 24908 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements), aligned with IEC 62612, with photometric test methods in the GB/T 9468 / CIE-based family. Performance declarations support Chinese energy-efficiency labelling under GB 30255 (see energy-label topic). The Chinese GB/T 24908 report is domestic evidence; under the RSB PVoC route, an IEC 62612-based performance report (often from an ILAC-accredited lab) is normally relied on.
summary.zh: 中国对应的性能标准为 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——性能要求），与 IEC 62612 对齐，光度测试方法属 GB/T 9468／基于 CIE 的体系。性能声明支撑中国 GB 30255 下的能效标签（见能效标签主题）。中国 GB/T 24908 报告属境内证据；在 RSB PVoC 路径下通常采用基于 IEC 62612 的性能报告（多来自 ILAC 认可实验室）。
summary.zht: 中國對應的性能標準為 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——性能要求），與 IEC 62612 對齊，光度測試方法屬 GB/T 9468／基於 CIE 的體系。性能聲明支撐中國 GB 30255 下的能效標籤（見能效標籤主題）。中國 GB/T 24908 報告屬境內證據；在 RSB PVoC 路徑下通常採用基於 IEC 62612 的性能報告（多來自 ILAC 認可實驗室）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24908 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (aligned with IEC 62612)
GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps (see energy-label topic)

gap.en: GB/T 24908 and RS / IEC 62612 both derive from IEC 62612, so the performance parameter set is aligned. The gap is route and report acceptance: under the RSB PVoC route, Chinese GB/T 24908 reports are not automatically accepted, and an IEC 62612-based report from an accredited lab is normally required. Declared CRI, efficacy and lumen-maintenance figures should be consistent with the energy-label claim, because the PVoC body may cross-check them. Note Rwanda's energy programme drives the efficacy / labelling side rather than a separate mandatory performance grade in the EU sense.
gap.zh: GB/T 24908 与 RS／IEC 62612 均源自 IEC 62612，故性能参数集一致。差距在于路径与报告接受：在 RSB PVoC 路径下，中国 GB/T 24908 报告不会被自动接受，通常须提供来自认可实验室的基于 IEC 62612 的报告。声明的 CRI、光效与光通维持率数值应与能效标签声称一致，因为 PVoC 机构可能交叉核验。注意卢旺达的能效计划驱动光效／标签一侧，而非欧盟意义上的单独强制性能等级。
gap.zht: GB/T 24908 與 RS／IEC 62612 均源自 IEC 62612，故性能參數集一致。差距在於路徑與報告接受：在 RSB PVoC 路徑下，中國 GB/T 24908 報告不會被自動接受，通常須提供來自認可實驗室的基於 IEC 62612 的報告。聲明的 CRI、光效與光通維持率數值應與能效標籤聲稱一致，因為 PVoC 機構可能交叉核驗。注意盧旺達的能效計劃驅動光效／標籤一側，而非歐盟意義上的單獨強制性能等級。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — performance declaration to RS / IEC 62612 supports the PVoC Certificate of Conformity and the energy-label claim; verify scope with the inspection body
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended GB/T 24908 for performance; GB 30255 energy-efficiency grading is the mandatory energy element in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamp performance for Rwanda is declared against RS / IEC 62612, supporting both the PVoC Certificate of Conformity and the energy-label claim. GB/T 24908 and IEC 62612 are aligned, but Chinese reports are not automatically accepted; an IEC 62612 report from an accredited lab is typically required, with declared figures consistent with the energy-label claim.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向卢旺达的自镇流 LED 灯性能依据 RS／IEC 62612 声明，支撑 PVoC 符合性证书与能效标签声称。GB/T 24908 与 IEC 62612 一致，但中国报告不会被自动接受；通常须提供来自认可实验室的 IEC 62612 报告，且声明数值须与能效标签声称一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向盧旺達的自鎮流 LED 燈性能依據 RS／IEC 62612 聲明，支撐 PVoC 符合性證書與能效標籤聲稱。GB/T 24908 與 IEC 62612 一致，但中國報告不會被自動接受；通常須提供來自認可實驗室的 IEC 62612 報告，且聲明數值須與能效標籤聲稱一致。
